areaLabel: Highland Pass, Waystation Gate, and Supply Court Slice
notes: Fifth real slice extends east from Ridgeway Camp into a highland pass, a guarded waystation gate, and an eastern supply court. Gameplay/content now closes a reusable courier-token -> gate check -> east warp -> supply shop loop, while visual parity remains on a separate replacement backlog so placeholders do not block chapter closure. / 第五段真实切片从山营继续向东扩展到高坡山道、驿门关口和东侧补给院。当前 gameplay/content 已经收口出一条可复用的“传令兵发牌 -> 守将验牌 -> 东门放行 -> 补给商店”闭环，而 visual parity 则单独进入替换 backlog，避免 placeholder 反向阻塞章节闭环。
title: Highland Waystation Approach
